mapper.select: SELECT s.*, st.name as student_name, st.student_no, c.course_name, st.class_name FROM score s LEFT JOIN student st ON s.student_id = st.id LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id ORDER BY s.create_time DESC

SELECT s.*, st.name as student_name, st.student_no, c.course_name, st.class_name FROM score s LEFT JOIN student st ON s.student_id = st.id LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY s.create_time DESC

SELECT s.*, st.name as student_name, st.student_no, c.course_name, st.class_name FROM score s LEFT JOIN student st ON s.student_id = st.id LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id WHERE s.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY s.create_time DESC

SELECT s.*, st.name as student_name, st.student_no, c.course_name, st.class_name FROM score s LEFT JOIN student st ON s.student_id = st.id LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id WHERE s.semester = #{semester} ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO score (student_id, course_id, score_value, semester, exam_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{scoreValue}, #{semester}, #{examTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE score SET student_id = #{studentId}, course_id = #{courseId}, score_value = #{scoreValue}, semester = #{semester}, exam_time = #{examTime} WHERE id = #{id}
